prompt: A refined dark new tab wallpaper inspired by Monet's nocturne water lily atmosphere: expansive deep charcoal-blue negative space, a faint lily pond reflection drifting along the lower edge, soft broken brushstrokes, muted luminous accents, quiet and elegant.
style: Nocturnal French Impressionism inspired by Monet, soft oil brushwork, dark atmospheric UI wallpaper with generous negative space.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 75-85% clean deep dark negative space. Place subtle pond reflections and a few lily shapes low across the bottom edge, leaving the center and upper area calm for dark UI.
lighting: Very soft moonlit glow, low contrast, tranquil night atmosphere.
palette: deep charcoal blue, ink navy, muted teal, dim lavender, pale moonlit green, small warm cream accents
materials: visible oil-paint brushstrokes, subtle canvas texture, soft pigment edges
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Must feel like a premium dark UI wallpaper, not a dense painting. Keep the center readable and uncluttered.
negative: busy full-frame scene, bright white background, harsh contrast, hard outlines, readable typography, photorealism, glossy 3D

prompt: A minimal dark pointillist new tab wallpaper inspired by Seurat: sparse colored dots forming a quiet riverside night park along the bottom edge, vast dark navy sky-like negative space, refined and low-noise.
style: Seurat-inspired pointillism adapted for dark UI, fine sparse stippling, understated night park motif, elegant and minimal.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 80% open deep navy space. Place dotted trees, waterline, and tiny reflection accents only along the lower margin and far right edge.
lighting: Soft twilight glow, subtle shimmer, low contrast suitable for UI overlays.
palette: deep navy, graphite, muted emerald, dusty violet, dim rose, pale gold dots used sparingly
materials: fine pointillist dots, matte dark paper texture, subtle printed grain
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Dots should feel delicate and sparse, not noisy behind UI controls.
negative: dense all-over point pattern, bright white canvas, large figures, high contrast, readable typography, photorealism

prompt: A modern Chinese ink shanshui dark UI wallpaper: deep ink-black and blue-gray negative space, delicate moonlit mountain silhouettes and terraced fields along the bottom-left edge, faint mist, restrained mineral color accents, poetic and quiet.
style: Modern Chinese Ink Shanshui / Vintage Line Art Illustration adapted for a dark interface background, delicate ink lines and broad dark empty space.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 75-85% open dark space. Put mountains, terraces, and a tiny pavilion low and left, leaving center clean for Lumno newtab UI.
lighting: Soft moonlit mist, calm classical atmosphere, low contrast.
palette: ink black, deep blue-gray, muted stone green, smoky beige, dim ochre, fine pale ink highlights
materials: dark rice-paper texture, fine ink outlines, faint watercolor wash, vintage print grain
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Keep linework delicate, elegant, and low-density. Center must stay clean and readable.
negative: crowded mountain scene, bright white paper background, saturated fantasy colors, anime character, glossy 3D, readable typography

prompt: A dark retro linocut topographic new tab wallpaper: charcoal paper negative space, sparse psychedelic contour lines and terraced strata flowing from the lower-left corner, muted ochre and ember orange ink, coarse print texture, sophisticated and calm.
style: Retro Linocut Topographic Art / Psychedelic Strata adapted for dark UI, coarse ink texture, restrained contour-line motif, low visual density.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 75% deep charcoal negative space. Place contour bands only along the lower-left and bottom edge, leaving center and upper area uncluttered.
lighting: Flat dark print contrast, subtle vintage graphic mood, not too bright.
palette: charcoal black, deep umber, muted ochre, ember orange, dark rust, tiny cream accents
materials: linocut ink grain, matte paper texture, vintage engraving roughness
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Must be background-friendly with low contrast in the center.
negative: dense full-frame pattern, neon orange everywhere, bright white background, readable typography, glossy 3D, photorealism

prompt: A surreal dark 3D architectural minimalism new tab wallpaper: expansive deep blue-black space, a small cluster of matte textured stone monoliths emerging from calm dark water near the lower-right edge, pale moon disk, quiet liminal elegance.
style: 3D Architectural Minimalism / Monochromatic Surrealism adapted for dark UI, minimal sculptural forms and large dark negative space.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 75-85% clean dark space. Place the sculpture and faint water reflection low and to the right, with open center for UI content.
lighting: Soft moonlit blue rim light, subtle reflections, quiet and spacious.
palette: blue-black, deep cyan, graphite, moon gray, muted stone blue, very small pale highlights
materials: matte scratched stone, calm dark water reflection, subtle atmospheric haze, clean 3D render
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Keep it minimal, airy, and suitable behind dark newtab UI.
negative: clutter, people, city, vegetation, bright white background, high contrast spotlight, cartoon style, readable typography

prompt: A dark vintage risograph collage new tab wallpaper: smoky black paper background with large negative space, a few muted surreal mechanical collage fragments and halftone textures drifting at the far left and lower edge, nostalgic but quiet.
style: Vintage Grainy Risograph / Steampunk Collage adapted for dark UI, matte paper texture, sparse collage fragments, low-contrast printed grain.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 75-80% open dark paper space. Place collage fragments at far left and bottom-left only, leaving the center and right side calm for UI.
lighting: Dim printed contrast, aged dark paper atmosphere, understated nostalgic mood.
palette: smoky black, warm graphite, muted teal, dusty rust, faded brass, dark gray paper
materials: risograph grain, halftone dots, torn paper fibers, screenprint ink, collage edges
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Keep it airy for a dark UI background, not a busy poster.
negative: busy full-frame collage, neon colors, bright white paper, glossy 3D, readable typography, sharp modern UI mockups
